metadata.title: Publish to the Channel
metadata.audience: Humanitarians AI Fellows learning to use the Brutalist pipeline

beats.narration_text: Publish to the Channel. One script from finished file to live episode. Liam, in for Bear.

props.command: My video is compiled and QC-passed. How do I publish it to youtube.com/@humanitariansai in the Fellows Research playlist?
output: Playlist: Fellows Research — then flip public in Studio

beats.narration_text: Three nodes. First: the hr@humanitarians.ai email chip — that's where you request Gaurav's publishing script. Second: the at-humanitariansai YouTube channel. Third: the Fellows Research playlist, where a new thumbnail slides in as your episode goes live.

props.sparkLine: One script. Live in Fellows Research.

beats.narration_text: Before uploading, stage the publish. Run the stage underscore publish dot py script against your reel folder. It packages the master MP4, the SRT caption track, the description, and the metadata. CC ships with every post — the caption track is generated from the beat sheet, not auto-transcription.

props.title: stage_publish
props.code:
python3 brutalist-art/runtime/scripts/stage_publish.py \
  brutalist-art/youtube/hai-brutalist-what-is

# Packages:
#   mp4/hai-brutalist-what-is.mp4
#   hai-brutalist-what-is.srt   ← CC track
#   description.txt
#   chapter_number: 1 → playlist order

beats.narration_text: The upload posts the video as Unlisted. It never goes public automatically. You review it in YouTube Studio — check the captions, the title, the thumbnail — and then flip it to Public yourself. The human decides what goes live. The script never publishes without your confirmation.

artifactLines: Script uploads as Unlisted — never directly Public.
Review in YouTube Studio: captions, title, thumbnail.
Flip to Public manually — the human decides.
Fellows Research playlist order set by chapter_number.
props.sparkLine: Unlisted is unaudited. Public is your call.

beats.narration_text: One script from finished file to live episode — email hr@humanitarians.ai, stage, upload, review, flip public.

artifactLines: Email hr@humanitarians.ai for the publishing script.
Run stage_publish.py — packages MP4, SRT, description.
Upload posts as Unlisted to @humanitariansai channel.
Review in Studio, then flip to Public in Fellows Research.

beats.narration_text: Here's the prompt. My video is staged and ready to publish. Run stage underscore publish for the reel, verify the SRT caption track was generated from the beat sheet, and show me the upload command. Then tell me what to check in YouTube Studio before flipping it public. Run that prompt when your video is ready. Episode twelve covers profiling a fellow — that's the final episode.

props.command: My video is staged. Run stage_publish for the reel, verify the SRT caption track was generated from the beat sheet, show me the upload command, and tell me what to check in YouTube Studio before flipping it public.

beats.narration_text: Publish to the Channel. Episode eleven of twelve. Next: Profile a Fellow.
